TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Greenlan, title = Greenlan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Greenlan} }

S.FORM: == Kolinlanś†ľťôĶŤė≠ == Kolinlan o sakakay a kanatal itini i hekal, o kakahad i, ira2,166,086 km¬≤, mahaop a matahepo no so'eda ko 80% a sera. O sowal no Tanmay to "Kolinlan" hananay i, o "kandaway pala" anoca o "langsaway sera" , o ilaloma'ay no Tanmay Hontian-Kitakit a Niyah-pikowan a Etal. nikawrira, i 2008 mihecaan a Kapolongan-Pitopa malaheci i 2009 mihecaan a mafalic ko faco no kitakit malamisiieday to niyah-pikowan i lalomaan a demak, o kacacefelisan-demak ato roma a kitakti, o sofitay ato paysoan a demak o Tanmay sifo ko citodongay. O tatapangan a kitakit no Kolinla o Tanmay i 1973 miheca mikapot to kasasiromaroma a saopo no Yoropa, nikawrira, i 1982 mihecan a Kapolongan-Pitopa mihayi ko 'alomanay i 1985 miheca a "Kakaketon no Kolinlan" to piliyas to Yoropa-Lekatep,orasaka tahanini cowa ko cefang no Yoropa-Lekatep, nikawrira, o siikeda sanay a kapot no Yoropa-Patekoan Lekatep. O tamdaw no Kolinlan o tamdaw no Tanmay hananay ko pisa'osi, patokeled sa ira ko solongoc no Tamdaw no Yoropa-Lekatep. O Kolinlan matiya o Falo-kanatanatal, manga'ay a miocor to tosa a tamdaw mikapot to Kalomaocan no Tanmay kitakit. O sera no kolinlan sahetoay itiraay i Saka'amisay-Poco' no cikiw, ikakaay ko kasi'enaw. Malalaeday to riyar makakecor ato So'eda-Kanatal kitakit ato Kanata. Kolinlan-Kanatal(Kalaallit NunaatÔľõGr√łnland) ira2,166,086 km¬≤, mahaop a matahepo no so'eda ko 80% a sera, itiraay i saka'amisan no sakawali no Ka'amisay-Amirika, ila'eday no Ka'amisay So'edaan-Riyar ato Tasiyang. O sa'osi i 2019 mihecaan ira ko 55,992 ko tamdaw, o kaditek no tamdaw 0.028 km¬≤.Mapangangan to Sakatosa-Karopaw ko Kolinlan, sakakaay ko kakahad no So'edaan-'Alo a karopaw,dengan i ka'amisay ato kawali ato ka'etipay-poco' ko cowa ka tahepo no so'eda, nawhani, fa'edetay ko romi'ad itini, orasaka, ira a masadak ko sera a manengneng. Ano waniken no mitahepoay a so'eda i sasifo'an wa ila'eno to ko sera. I sakawaliwalian no sasifo'an ko takaraway nani tongroh no riyar ira ko 3300 laya', i salawacan nani tongroh no riyar ira ko 1000~2000 laya'. Ano ha'eminen a mikarkar ko so'eda no Kolinlan, masakanatanatal ko namangicngicay no So'eda-'Alo,macakar to tongroh no riya to 7 laya'.
S.PHON: == ko~u…ĺin…ĺan*** == ko~u…ĺin…ĺan o~u sakakaj a kanata…ĺ itini i ńß…ôka…ĺ, o~u kakańßa…¨~…ģ i, ira*,***,*** km*, mańßao~up a matańß…ôpo~u no~u so~u °…ô…¨~…ģa ko~u **% a s…ôra. o~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u tanmaj to~u "ko~u…ĺin…ĺan" ńßananaj i, o~u "kan…¨~…ģawaj pa…ĺa" ano~u ¶a o~u "…ĺaŇčsawaj s…ôra" , o~u i…ĺa…ĺo~uma °aj no~u tanmaj ńßo~untian-kitakit a nijańß-piko~uwan a …ôta…ĺ. nikawrira, i **** mińß…ô ¶aan a kapo~u…ĺo~uŇčan-pito~upa ma…ĺańß…ô ¶i i **** mińß…ô ¶aan a mafa…ĺi ¶ ko~u fa ¶o~u no~u kitakit ma…ĺamisii…ô…¨~…ģaj to~u nijańß-piko~uwan i …ĺa…ĺo~umaan a …¨~…ģ…ômak, o~u ka ¶a ¶…ôf…ô…ĺisan-…¨~…ģ…ômak ato~u ro~uma a kitakti, o~u so~ufitaj ato~u pajso~uan a …¨~…ģ…ômak o~u tanmaj sifo~u ko~u ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj. o~u tatapaŇčan a kitakit no~u ko~u…ĺin…ĺa o~u tanmaj i **** mińß…ô ¶a mikapo~ut to~u kasasiro~umaro~uma a sao~upo~u no~u jo~uro~upa, nikawrira, i **** mińß…ô ¶an a kapo~u…ĺo~uŇčan-pito~upa mińßaji ko~u °a…ĺo~umanaj i **** mińß…ô ¶a a "kakak…ôto~un no~u ko~u…ĺin…ĺan" to~u pi…ĺijas to~u jo~uro~upa-…ĺ…ôkat…ôp,o~urasaka tańßanini ¶o~uwa ko~u ¶…ôfaŇč no~u jo~uro~upa-…ĺ…ôkat…ôp, nikawrira, o~u siik…ô…¨~…ģa sanaj a kapo~ut no~u jo~uro~upa-pat…ôko~uan …ĺ…ôkat…ôp. o~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u ko~u…ĺin…ĺan o~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u tanmaj ńßananaj ko~u pisa °o~usi, pato~uk…ô…ĺ…ô…¨~…ģ sa ira ko~u so~u…ĺo~uŇčo~u ¶ no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u jo~uro~upa-…ĺ…ôkat…ôp. o~u ko~u…ĺin…ĺan matija o~u fa…ĺo~u-kanatanata…ĺ, maŇča °aj a mio~u ¶o~ur to~u to~usa a tam…¨~…ģaw mikapo~ut to~u ka…ĺo~umao~u ¶an no~u tanmaj kitakit. o~u s…ôra no~u ko~u…ĺin…ĺan sańß…ôto~uaj itiraaj i saka °amisaj-po~u ¶o~u ° no~u ¶ikiw, ikakaaj ko~u kasi °…ônaw. ma…ĺa…ĺa…ô…¨~…ģaj to~u rijar makak…ô ¶o~ur ato~u so~u °…ô…¨~…ģa-kanata…ĺ kitakit ato~u kanata. ko~u…ĺin…ĺan-kanata…ĺ(ka…ĺaa…ĺ…ĺit no~u~unaat**r*n…ĺan…¨~…ģ) ira*,***,*** km*, mańßao~up a matańß…ôpo~u no~u so~u °…ô…¨~…ģa ko~u **% a s…ôra, itiraaj i saka °amisan no~u sakawa…ĺi no~u ka °amisaj-amirika, i…ĺa °…ô…¨~…ģaj no~u ka °amisaj so~u °…ô…¨~…ģaan-rijar ato~u tasijaŇč. o~u sa °o~usi i **** mińß…ô ¶aan ira ko~u **,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw, o~u ka…¨~…ģit…ôk no~u tam…¨~…ģaw *.*** km*.mapaŇčaŇčan to~u sakato~usa-karo~upaw ko~u ko~u…ĺin…ĺan, sakakaaj ko~u kakańßa…¨~…ģ no~u so~u °…ô…¨~…ģaan- °a…ĺo~u a karo~upaw,…¨~…ģ…ôŇčan i ka °amisaj ato~u kawa…ĺi ato~u ka °…ôtipaj-po~u ¶o~u ° ko~u ¶o~uwa ka tańß…ôpo~u no~u so~u °…ô…¨~…ģa, nawńßani, fa °…ô…¨~…ģ…ôtaj ko~u ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ itini, o~urasaka, ira a masa…¨~…ģak ko~u s…ôra a man…ôŇčn…ôŇč. ano~u wanik…ôn no~u mitańß…ôpo~uaj a so~u °…ô…¨~…ģa i sasifo~u °an wa i…ĺa °…ôno~u to~u ko~u s…ôra. i sakawa…ĺiwa…ĺian no~u sasifo~u °an ko~u takarawaj nani to~uŇčro~uńß no~u rijar ira ko~u **** …ĺaja °, i sa…ĺawa ¶an nani to~uŇčro~uńß no~u rijar ira ko~u ****~**** …ĺaja °. ano~u ńßa °…ômin…ôn a mikarkar ko~u so~u °…ô…¨~…ģa no~u ko~u…ĺin…ĺan, masakanatanata…ĺ ko~u namaŇči ¶Ňči ¶aj no~u so~u °…ô…¨~…ģa- °a…ĺo~u,ma ¶akar to~u to~uŇčro~uńß no~u rija to~u * …ĺaja °.
S.FORM: == Kolinlanś†ľťôĶŤė≠ == Kolinlan o sakakay a kanatal itini i hekal, o kakahad i, ira2,166,086 km¬≤, mahaop a matahepo no so'eda ko 80% a sera. O sowal no Tanmay to "Kolinlan" hananay i, o "kandaway pala" anoca o "langsaway sera" , o ilaloma'ay no Tanmay Hontian-Kitakit a Niyah-pikowan a Etal. nikawrira, i 2008 mihecaan a Kapolongan-Pitopa malaheci i 2009 mihecaan a mafalic ko faco no kitakit malamisiieday to niyah-pikowan i lalomaan a demak, o kacacefelisan-demak ato roma a kitakti, o sofitay ato paysoan a demak o Tanmay sifo ko citodongay. O tatapangan a kitakit no Kolinla o Tanmay i 1973 miheca mikapot to kasasiromaroma a saopo no Yoropa, nikawrira, i 1982 mihecan a Kapolongan-Pitopa mihayi ko 'alomanay i 1985 miheca a "Kakaketon no Kolinlan" to piliyas to Yoropa-Lekatep,orasaka tahanini cowa ko cefang no Yoropa-Lekatep, nikawrira, o siikeda sanay a kapot no Yoropa-Patekoan Lekatep. O tamdaw no Kolinlan o tamdaw no Tanmay hananay ko pisa'osi, patokeled sa ira ko solongoc no Tamdaw no Yoropa-Lekatep. O Kolinlan matiya o Falo-kanatanatal, manga'ay a miocor to tosa a tamdaw mikapot to Kalomaocan no Tanmay kitakit. O sera no kolinlan sahetoay itiraay i Saka'amisay-Poco' no cikiw, ikakaay ko kasi'enaw. Malalaeday to riyar makakecor ato So'eda-Kanatal kitakit ato Kanata. Kolinlan-Kanatal(Kalaallit NunaatÔľõGr√łnland) ira2,166,086 km¬≤, mahaop a matahepo no so'eda ko 80% a sera, itiraay i saka'amisan no sakawali no Ka'amisay-Amirika, ila'eday no Ka'amisay So'edaan-Riyar ato Tasiyang. O sa'osi i 2019 mihecaan ira ko 55,992 ko tamdaw, o kaditek no tamdaw 0.028 km¬≤.Mapangangan to Sakatosa-Karopaw ko Kolinlan, sakakaay ko kakahad no So'edaan-'Alo a karopaw,dengan i ka'amisay ato kawali ato ka'etipay-poco' ko cowa ka tahepo no so'eda, nawhani, fa'edetay ko romi'ad itini, orasaka, ira a masadak ko sera a manengneng. Ano waniken no mitahepoay a so'eda i sasifo'an wa ila'eno to ko sera. I sakawaliwalian no sasifo'an ko takaraway nani tongroh no riyar ira ko 3300 laya', i salawacan nani tongroh no riyar ira ko 1000~2000 laya'. Ano ha'eminen a mikarkar ko so'eda no Kolinlan, masakanatanatal ko namangicngicay no So'eda-'Alo,macakar to tongroh no riya to 7 laya'.

¶o~u ° no~u ¶ikiw, ikakaaj ko~u kasi °…ônaw. ma…ĺa…ĺa…ô…¨~…ģaj to~u rijar makak…ô ¶o~ur ato~u so~u °…ô…¨~…ģa-kanata…ĺ kitakit ato~u kanata. ko~u…ĺin…ĺan-kanata…ĺ(ka…ĺaa…ĺ…ĺit no~u~unaat**r*n…ĺan…¨~…ģ) kakańßa…¨~…ģ no~u so~u °…ô…¨~…ģaan- °a…ĺo~u a karo~upaw,…¨~…ģ…ôŇčan i ka °amisaj ato~u kawa…ĺi ato~u ka °…ôtipaj-po~u ¶o~u ° ko~u ¶o~uwa ka tańß…ôpo~u no~u so~u °…ô…¨~…ģa, nawńßani, fa °…ô…¨~…ģ…ôtaj ko~u ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ itini, o~urasaka, ira a masa…¨~…ģak ko~u s…ôra a man…ôŇčn…ôŇč. ano~u wanik…ôn no~u mitańß…ôpo~uaj a so~u °…ô…¨~…ģa i sasifo~u °an wa i…ĺa °…ôno~u to~u ko~u s…ôra. i sakawa…ĺiwa…ĺian no~u sasifo~u °an ko~u takarawaj nani to~uŇčro~uńß no~u rijar ira ko~u **** …ĺaja °, i sa…ĺawa ¶an nani to~uŇčro~uńß no~u rijar ira ko~u ****~**** …ĺaja °. ano~u ńßa °…ômin…ôn a mikarkar ko~u so~u °…ô…¨~…ģa no~u ko~u…ĺin…ĺan, masakanatanata…ĺ ko~u namaŇči ¶Ňči ¶aj no~u so~u °…ô…¨~…ģa- °a…ĺo~u,ma ¶akar to~u to~uŇčro~uńß no~u rija to~u * …ĺaja °.
